description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, and bold graphic print and lettering on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery The rules for amassing wealth are not written in black and white. Sometimes it's both. This black tee from tantra is all about money - the good and the bad! So, take your pick. Team this t-shirt with jeans, shorts or cargoes and feel the power of money!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
